reviews.review_description: I wasn't sure of this at first but after doing some reading online I thought I would give it a go. I'm a Mom of a U11 GK and I was struggling to find ways of giving my son more practice at home outside of doing stretches and bouncing the ball against a wall. I was BLOWN AWAY by how much he loved this. He wants to train on it every night and it's difficult to pull him off it now as he says it's helping him improve. Really glad I found this.

developer_response.body: Hi aimsley - this is such an amazing review! Thanks for taking the time to write about how much your son is enjoying CleanSheet Pro - we spent a great deal of time researching how to best develop goalkeepers in VR so it's great to hear how CleanSheet Pro is helping your son improve

reviews.review_description: As a sunday league goalkeeper I wanted to practice more during the week without needing to go down to my local pitches after work and I have to say this worked a treat - cheers!

Cleensheet devolopers it is a GAME. Remember it is a GAME
Really high quality training for my son - really pleased with this product as he is a very promising goalkeeper and needs all the help he can get

reviews.review_title: Developers, Here’s what the game needs
reviews.review_description: The game needs to go size like a dead and clean sheet soccer where you can determine the width and height of the goal. You would also be nice if you made it a one time payment instead of like clean sheet soccer. Clean sheet soccer was fun but had very few game modes and options so clean sheet pro would be an amazing upgrade. You can make it so clean sheet pro would have an actual goalkeeper coach to coach you on what you’re doing right and wrong it’ll be very helpful if you turned your clean sheet soccer and made it exactly like clean sheet pro the only difference with clean sheet pro is that you would have your own manager that can coach you. Everything I said is what everyone really needs, sir people love it so do why but they don’t love on paying over $200 a year or $30 a month. I want your two games to have a difference between having fun and improving yourself and taking goalkeeping seriously with a goalkeeper coach. The tutorials and clean sheet pro could be a little more specific for example, the positioning one one of my favorite parts about this game is that you can create your own shots. like I said, I want everything and clean cheap pro to be clean sheet soccer clean sheet pro has an actual goalkeeper coach and this is awesome, but for God sake, please get Moore soundtracks for your game i’m really tired of the Lofi beats playing wine sweating myself off. The developers are exceptionally phenomenal and perfected the game of clean sheet soccer and clean sheet pro but there are problems that can be easily fixed. I want to enjoy clean sheet pro as a fun goalkeeper game as it’s already better than all the other goalkeeper games but if you want to get more people to buy your game, get rid of the subscription. All I ask for incisiv PLEAAAAASE!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi caseydooley - Thank you so much for the detailed feedback and for supporting both CleanSheet Soccer and CleanSheet Pro. We genuinely appreciate the passion and ideas — especially from players who care deeply about both the fun side of goalkeeping and the serious training side.

A lot of what you mentioned is actually very aligned with where we’re taking CleanSheet Pro. We’re currently building dedicated goalkeeper coaches for each of the three teams in the game: Waveport City, Stanton United, and Forgehill Rovers. The goal is for each coach and manager to help players improve with more specific feedback, guidance, and personality, while still keeping the game fun and immersive.

We also hear you on tutorials, positioning detail, customisation, soundtrack variety, and more training depth. Feedback like this helps us prioritise what matters most to players, and we’re continuing to improve these areas over time.

Regarding the subscription: we completely understand why some players would prefer a one-time payment. The reason we currently use a subscription model is because CleanSheet Pro relies on a large amount of ongoing data collection, analytics, and backend services to power the training systems and future coaching features. Those systems have continuous operating costs, and the subscription helps us keep developing and supporting the game long-term.

That said, we absolutely want players to feel they’re getting value from it, and our focus is on continuing to expand the experience with deeper coaching systems, more modes, more content, and more improvements.

Thank you again for the support, the honesty, and the ideas. We’re glad you already see CleanSheet Pro as one of the best goalkeeper games out there, and we’re working hard to make it even better.

reviews.review_description: Game seems cool right? Wrong. 230+ a month is way to much? Even with the 35% off or 50% off whatever it doesnt really help. Make the game cost money or make the subscription cheaper, its very stupid, and i was excited for this because i loved cleansheet!

developer_response.body:
Hi eggstervr28 - Thanks for sharing your thoughts, we really appreciate the honesty.

CleanSheet Pro was built from the ground up as a professional training tool, not just a game. It works alongside real goalkeepers and coaches, tracks detailed performance data, and creates a personalized training program with AI-recommended drills, a full career progression system, and a mobile companion app. Because of this ongoing, individualized training service, the product is structured as a subscription rather than a one-time purchase.

Also just to clarify: CleanSheet Pro includes a free 7-day trial. It may look like you’re paying upfront, but you aren’t charged unless you continue after the trial, and you can cancel anytime during those 7 days without being billed.

Thanks again for loving the original CleanSheet — and for taking the time to leave feedback. It genuinely helps us improve!

developer_response.body: Hi stellingster - thanks for the 5 star review! Currently there is no multiplayer in CleanSheet Pro but we do have global leaderboards so you can compete against other goalies across our 7 in-game scenarios and 5 drills!

I encourage anyone to give it a try because it's a work out - but it's very much worth it. The differing game modes keep the game interesting and the physics themself are spot on. Great work by the Dev team!

reviews.review_description:
To all those downrating due to cost: we, the real goalkeepers, forgive you. You do not need this. 

This is for those who seek value in their VR experience. If you look beyond the fun to the evaluation of parameters that NO OTHRER method can measure, you will see why this is a serious training tool.  Commit to this with goals of improvement and work the most important muscle of your professional sports career: your brain. 
Thank you developers.

We have tried to communicate this as much as possible so anyone buying knows it's for those who want to be the best goalkeeper they can be. We have poured our heart and soul into developing the best goalkeeping training app out there! We're so happy you appreciate it! Thank you!

Can you add the ability to make transfer requests more frequent? Once a month isn't a lot

reviews.review_description: could you please make it so you can change the size of the net like cleansheet soccer, because not everyone has the space for it. I was really excited for this to come out, and seeing you couldn't change the net size was a big let down. Otherwise, a great game.

developer_response.body: Hi MiniEndless — thanks for the feedback! We redesigned the net-size system so shot width now scales with difficulty. The yellow box at your feet marks your Play Zone, and shots will never go wider than that. If you want more central shots, just turn off the Ranked toggle in drills or scenarios and choose a lower difficulty. Thanks again for the review!

reviews.review_description: Bought for my daughter at Christmas time as she’s a goalkeeper for an U15 team and she absolutely loves it - the drills and scenarios are very realistic and it’s encouraging to see her improve day on day - highly recommended

reviews.review_description:
This game is soo much fun, it manages the right ratio of training and fun games. 

Set for all skill levels, it can be an intense workout to improve your in real life goalkeeper skills or if you just want to play for fun, they have that too!

The creator mode allows you to create your own shot to save, your own buildup leading up to it. 

10/10 game!

reviews.review_description: Way too much money for a little upgrade on the base game. And also no way of changing the shot zone? Come on you have to do better

developer_response.body:
Hi JJGK34 - thanks for taking the time to share your feedback. We understand your concerns around pricing and features. CleanSheet Pro is built as a serious goalkeeping training tool, while CleanSheet Soccer is designed to be a more gamified, casual experience, which is why the focus and feature set differ.

At the moment, the yellow zone at your feet defines where shots are aimed. We agree that shot zone customisation is an important area to improve, and it’s something we’re actively exploring. Our challenge is ensuring fair goalkeeper-to-goalkeeper comparisons without unintentionally giving an advantage to players with smaller play areas - but we’re working on solutions.

We appreciate the honest feedback and will continue refining CleanSheet Pro based on player input.

reviews.review_description: Is so bad DON’T BUY IT you need to dive snd if you have a small room don’t buy it

developer_response.body:
Hi Maoureto - thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear you had a frustrating experience.

In CleanSheet Pro, you should never need to dive. All shots are directed into the yellow zone at your feet, so the game can be played safely even in smaller rooms.

That said, we really appreciate you highlighting this concern. We’re currently exploring a feature that will let players adjust their goal size, making it easier to tailor the experience to your available space.

Thanks again for helping us improve! If you have any other issues or suggestions, we’d love to hear them.
